name: devsu-qa-automation
description: Devsu QA Automation — E2E + API (Cypress + Cucumber + Allure)

scripts.test: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE cypress run --headless --browser chrome --env allure=true
scripts.test:api: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE cypress run --headless --browser chrome --env allure=true --spec 'cypress/e2e/petstore/**/*.feature'
scripts.test:e2e: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE cypress run --headless --browser chrome --env allure=true --spec 'cypress/e2e/saucedemo/**/*.feature'
